instruction: Turn right and walk along the red carpet to your right. Walk past the doorway wait by the glass info panes.

text:

2. Predict each leg of movement with specific expectations
3. Execute movements in batches
4. Verify against observations
5. Use arithmetic to track pose
6. Keep a ledger of frames and junctions
7. Identify goal candidates and stop when close enough
